name: Squid Game
description: The South Korean dystopian thriller about a deadly competition for a massive cash prize

questions.q: On which streaming platform does Squid Game release?

source.notes: Became Netflix's most-watched series launch ever.

questions.q: What color tracksuits do the players wear in the arena?

source.notes: Inspired by Korean school tracksuits of the 1970s-80s.

questions.q: What is the player number of the main character, Seong Gi-hun?

source.notes: Also the total number of players in the original game.

questions.q: In which country is Squid Game set and produced?

source.notes: Produced by Siren Pictures for Netflix.

questions.q: Which actor won an Emmy for Outstanding Lead Actor in a Drama Series for playing Seong Gi-hun?

source.notes: First non-English-language performer to win in that category (2022).

questions.q: What is the first deadly game, which features a giant robotic doll?

source.notes: Korean name: 'Mugunghwa kkochi pieotseumnida' ('The hibiscus flower has blossomed').

questions.q: What is the name of the large animatronic doll that leads the first game?

source.notes: Based on old Korean schoolbook illustrations.

questions.q: Who created, wrote, and directed Squid Game?

source.notes: Wrote the script in 2009 based on his financial struggles.

questions.q: Approximately how much in Korean won is the grand prize for winning Squid Game?

source.notes: Roughly US$38 million; ₩100 million per eliminated player.

questions.q: What three shapes distinguish the guards' masks by rank — worker, soldier, and manager?

source.notes: Also the three shapes forming the Squid Game logo.

questions.q: Which Strauss waltz, also famously used in 2001: A Space Odyssey, plays when each new game begins?

source.notes: Plays as the players are woken each morning.

questions.q: Which Korean traditional honeycomb sugar candy game do the players play in round 2?

source.notes: Players must extract a shape without cracking it.

questions.q: In what year did Squid Game originally premiere on Netflix?

source.notes: Season 2 premiered December 26, 2024.

questions.q: Who plays Oh Il-nam, the elderly Player 001?

source.notes: Won a Golden Globe for Best Supporting Actor in 2022.

questions.q: What was the working English title of Squid Game before its official release?

source.notes: Referring to the six rounds of the deadly competition.

questions.q: Which South Korean superstar cameos as the well-dressed recruiter who plays ddakji with Gi-hun at the start?

source.notes: Best known for Train to Busan (2016) and Goblin (2016-2017).

questions.q: Who plays Player 067, the North Korean defector Kang Sae-byeok?

source.notes: A former fashion model; won a SAG Award in 2022.

questions.q: Which infiltrating police officer investigates the game from the inside in Season 1?

source.notes: Played by Wi Ha-joon; searching for his missing brother.

questions.q: Who is revealed in the Season 1 finale to actually be the creator of Squid Game?

source.notes: A wealthy man with a brain tumor who joined the game out of boredom.

questions.q: What is the real name of the masked Front Man, revealed through Season 1?

source.notes: Brother of Detective Hwang Jun-ho; former game winner.

questions.q: Which optical-illusion artwork visually inspired the game's famous staircase corridors?

source.notes: Escher's 1953 lithograph of impossible multi-gravity architecture.

questions.q: Roughly how many households watched Squid Game globally in its first 28 days, a Netflix record?

source.notes: Also racked up over 1.65 billion viewing hours in that window.
